reviews.review_title: This is the best hame of my life
reviews.review_description: The story, the gameplay, the guns, the characters is all perfect I played it like 3 times in a row. It genually changed the way I look at life and it genually deserves more attention. Is no joke the most cinematic game I played and I spend a lot of money on big games on steam its genually better than call of duty ww2.

I have never played a games that is as CINEMATIC and AWESOME SAUCE as this. The fact that it is free aswell just makes me feel all tingly and warm inside EVERYWHERE. When I heard about this game, I had pretty low expectations judging by it being free and made by a small developer… I HAVE NEVER SEEN ANY OTHER GAME THAT IS BETTER. Pavlov is cool but doesn’t have a story line, I haven’t tried breaches yet so idk, and basically everything else sucks. 
In conclusion…it’s aight. (Exit music plays) (Enrique sound effect)
Dinoman1302 is just a hater who has terrible taste in FREE games

One of the best games I have ever played. The storyline is super creative, it’s a really long campaign, and it is extremely satisfying to shoot bugs and watch them explode. So many different aspects, never gets old. Thank you so much for this gem

The boss fight against the actual bug boss is difficult because as soon as you die once you won't have time to pick up weapons that's hard because he will just chase you around and you practically can't do anything otherwise it would have been a five

I like the storyline of this game and the fact that its free but allies are useless. They either just stand there or shoot the ground. Also add more checkpoints in the prison level. But other than that its a great game
This free indie game is packed to the brim with adventure and just generally fun and especially because it was FREE please support the game it is so good!

I play on my meta quest 3s in it super fun in please make a catus cowboy 4 where catus cowboy can drive cars fly planes in also do missions in war while he is driving or flying in make emery planes so it will be funer i love this game thank you for making the best game ever
This game is the best game I have played in vr. It is so cinematic and the plot is awesome. Everything is so well made, it has a good mix of hard and easy parts. Great job to the creators.
Absolutely amazing game. The story and lore are so in depth for the simplicity of this game. Has amazing weapons and enemies and incredible variety

You know, most WWII games or any war games that the store you gave me one or two days to complete, this took me a month, on EASY, the cinematic scenes Make me actually feel emotion. It is a good way to represent WWII to the eyes of teens, and yet show how even in the worst of moments, we can find the good side.
I thank creators, the community, and everyone for making this AMAZING game! 

Thank you… like it’s my fav game!

This game has terrible shooting physics, not even fun, and obviously made by people that do not know anything about which side is the better one.

the side you are playing on is obviously the axis,
proof:
Stuka planes, on your side.
flag, a green version of the German flag
Tiger tanks, on your side
spitfire planes, on the bad side.
Sherman tanks, on the bad side.
terrible game overall.
I finished the game today and it’s amazing I highly recommend it and how is this game free it’s so amazing GET THE GAME
I don't know how to explain it its just good and funny.
From the funny voice lines to the fear-inducing machine-guns, this game is a blast! I kind of actually felt like I was in World War II at the beginning too!

I’ve been locked in a cell with no way out whatsoever even after i’ve tried all the methods i’ve searched up. Game doesn’t give you prompts what to do in this situation whatsoever. Would be 5 stars otherwise

developer_response.body:
You are right, this is certainly an issue. Thanks for bringing this up.
You can punch the locks with your fists.

reviews.review_description: Top Mechanics, great humor and story! Never seen something as good as this for free!

This game is THE BEST 👌
 experience you will get in VR. even though it's 5 years old at this point, it holds up PERFECTLY. If you get stuck in the sniper level, just try again a few days later, I promise it will work. You need to try this game NOW! ITS LITERALLY  FREE!!!!!! 
Edit: Forgot to say, Emilio is the best man he's so funny dude lmao

One of the worst games ever on VR.
1. The weapons are trash and doesn't match the teams
2. Story us full with false information about the war
There's so much bad stuff about this game but it would take me too much time to write. Don't get this game

developer_response.body: This is a fiction not a realistic simulator. You play a cactus. Don't take things too seriously.

reviews.review_description: Its terrible graphics but good story and fun gameplay, surprisingly good.

This game was insane, I loved the attention to detail with the weapons even though they could’ve been more realistic but anyways the story was so fun, if you don’t believe me try it out.
This is amazing! Best story game I’ve found on meta quest🔥🔥🔥🔥
Very accurate on world War 2 but got stuck on the prison level then gave up

How is this game with funny lines, a story game and is super immersive and fun FREE


Fire game 🔥🔥🔥🤩

reviews.review_title: This should be your first game
reviews.review_description:
I remember when I got my first VR it was the best 
thing ever and I didn’t really know what other games should I get besides blade and sorcery and bone lab? But when I saw this game, oh God, it was the best thing ever and you should play it too. ￼

People keep saying to not get this game even tho it’s free and keep saying the animations are bad (it’s made by one person) how do you expect it to be the best animations in the world any way it is a good game hope for many more like it

reviews.review_title: if you're looking for a really good game
reviews.review_description: it's a very good game and if you're looking for a world war two shooter that's free this is for you and i spend 24 hours playing this game and i do not regret it at all i'm gonna try to see if i can get the other game cuz the other game looks really fun they should call it old legends returning

reviews.review_title: I haven’t played this game in years
reviews.review_description: I’ve played every cactus cowboy game and I gotta say a game of questionable quality is perfect for the intro but it’s an amazing game it’s my hands down favourite cactus cowboy game followed closely by desert warfare it’s an amazing story the guns are great it’s genuinely one of the best games I’ve played in years (other than wolfenstein) it’s almost on the same level as Into the radius in entertainment value I hope cactus studios keeps up the good work they’re doing gods work overall amazing game

reviews.review_title: THIS IS THE BEST GAME EVER
reviews.review_description: It took 5 hours about but good game play this is the best vr game i have ever played i was sad i finished it made my vr childhood.
First of all it’s like a story line of world war of plants vs bugs then it’s also reference of it not being fully the same but it’s a awesome game one of the best I’ve played awesome

reviews.review_title: I put 5 stars because that's the limit
reviews.review_description: This is one of the best games I have ever played, not just on vr but ever, and that's alot coming from a  big time gamer. It's got some good lore and is perfect
Honestly haven’t played in years but I remember this being probably the best game ever. I absolutely loved it and was very surprised at the story. This is almost as good as free Pavlov

This game has real places from ww2 like cactigrad. And the weapons that you find are op
Best game that is FREE on vr

this game is hard annoying and you're allies don't even help you second of all you should not get this game because when you get to the prison it is so hard to finish and if you die you just reset you all the way to the end this is why you shouldn't buy cactus cowboys

reviews.review_title: should be game of the year ngl
reviews.review_description:
this game is life changing, it's a fun game with a good story and it's free, and destroying tanks, sniping down enemy bugs, and destroying robots is really fun, plus if you die you keep your ammo and you get your guns back.
🤌

This game is amazing, the only crime this game has is being free, that game is so good that it should have costed money. Every VR game is either to expensive or just flat out terrible. This is a rare find.

reviews.review_title: Best free singleplayer game on vr
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing, from the low graphics that work really well with the theme, to the realistic gun physics you couldnt ask for any more. The story is amazing and it really takes you on a journey. The humorous side to this game is perfect aswell with the low graphics, funny characters and great voice acting. Overall this game is pretty much perfect and a must get for any shooter enjoyers
This game is AMAZING i can’t get enough of it. It is so fun and addictive. I just wish they add multiplayer and sandbox mode it is so worth it the storyline is really good GET IT YOU HAVE TO!!!

STORY IS 5 STARS GRAMPS IS 5 STARS GUNS ARE 5 STARS END/START MUSIC = INFINITE STARS AND EVERYTHING 5 STARS

😎😎😎😎😎😎😎😎🤯🤯🤯🤯🥳🥳🥳🥳😆😆😆😆

reviews.review_title: This is the best VR game ever made
reviews.review_description: One of the best games I've played overall; including PC and console
even tho I played on my uncles psvr2 I saw this game and I wanted to play it and it was fun to play so I had my own headset to download this game and play it again and again.

I saw that this game was free on the meta-quest so I picked it up and I was able to play it the same day and oh my God it was so good. I’m still currently playing it as I’m writing this, but it has great story and I’m pretty sure whoever plays this game will probably likes it as well. it has cool weapons from real time weapons they use from World War II so if I was you, I’ll pick it up. ￼

This game is just mediocre, your allies dont attack the enemy and just kinna shoot in front of them, the bosses feel like they drag on way too long and it feels like you barely make progress on them, the levels have horrible checkpoints, mounted mgs are just death traps since you cant move while using them, on harder sections in the levels your checkpoint is just before them but you dont get a checkpoint after the different section on the level so you cant die for a good bit after that section or youll have to replay it. Overall, not worth the space on my oculus 2 but im glad its free cuz if it costed money them id say it was a scam
I randomly got this game and now i'm obsessed peak story peak gameplay just peak

reviews.review_title: Not fun don't play this game
reviews.review_description: The first part of the game is fun but then it gets extremely boring.  Your allies are practice unless and there is swears in the game and it feels like you make no progress. PLEASE DONT'T PLAY THIS GAME
This is so fun. I love the story mode and it’s really good
The gameplay is good but whenever i ran out of ammunition once even if i reloaded the guns wouldn't shoot.
Its good and I love it but its so hard

Good story and characters (their voices do sound like ai tho) but quick complaint the npcs really don't do anything leaving you to kill like %98 of the enemies and the enemies just target you and don't go for the npcs

ill give a better review once you fix this
For being free it has a long story and good one at that. The only thing i can say bad about it is the enemy onto shoot anyone else they just target you. But overall a good free game
I haven’t played in 2 years and it still good
so sad that it just ended all the things me and emilio went through it was a tough war but very awesome now i have to move up to the other games of Cactus Studios.

It is an awesome game, but there are some bad words in it so it would be bad for little kids. I highly recommend because there is tons of action  
EMELIO for life!!!!!

reviews.review_title: All about the controls, they nailed it!
reviews.review_description: Graphics are not as important as how it plays. This is fundamentally a well executed game.
Its just that the language is really foul so i cant play it anymore pls make game setting to remove bad language

Bru can someone accturly give th devs a medal of cactus because what other vr game u can storm the beaches of normandy 4 free i love the movie refreces and emilio is the goat trust you will love this eccpecially if your into ww2 like me beaten the game twice because its so good

Made by one person, free, 4-6 hour campaign give or take, kinda stupid but funny story, just give it a try please

this is the best game ive ever played, hands down. Characters were amazing, storytelling was phenomenal, for SURE download this game

bosses were fire story line was super good voice actors if you see this review i'm so glad you made this game for free i loved it w chat

This game is so good for being free I love it I'm buying the desert

reviews.review_title: For a free game this is amazing!
reviews.review_description: This game is so random that its good for example one quote from the game is "your middle name is stephanie?!" absolute cinema
Overall fun and worth trying if you want a quick, casual shooter.
I like this game and I like how the guns feel but I would like it if you changed the bugs into ragdolls and you can grab them overall good game 👍👍👍
fun
This was honestly the best vr game i have ever played. Thd plot was so good i almost cried ahen it ended .12 out of 10 game

reviews.review_title: So fire and buns at the same time
reviews.review_description: It’s a great game and it’s free but only part that sucks is you can’t skip scenes and you can’t carry 2 guns on your back and that godamn Emilio I hate that cactus with all my heart. Bro takes credit for everything I did saying we when all he was doing was shooting the wall. But besides that the game is fire the story line is fire and I thought it was gonna be a short story but its actually pretty long and it’s free which is surprising other games on vr are short or so buns that they’re not worth the money. Also I like the design it makes it feel like a game I would play on unblockedgames99 at school on my Chromebook. def gonna get dessert warfare and it’s only 10$ and Ik it’s definitely worth it after playing this .
I just got it today and it is HELLA PEAK gameplay 10/10 guns 9.5/10 lore 10/10
Very good game.I played this game for hours and it had a very good story,5 stars.Also can't wait to play the other cactus cowboys.
This game is a blast! Highly recommended!
You cat evan reload
Absolutely amazing
The game that doesnt need good graphics is this, not only is it long and fun. Ai could be better but the game might aswell be my number 1 favorite
The game was fun I played over an 1 hour and overall the game is really fun

Very good game but needs to be easier plus these enemies are kind of hard and there should at least be better checkpoints if u didn’t like this try dessert warfare it is a bit better than this but fully loaded is so trash plus there should be infinite ammo and instead of having to reach down to get guns that fell make it I just press the picking up button and point at it 😤 makes me mad when I reach far and lose still good tho for a free game rip the people who died in the beginning honestly I love it when it is during war areas.

reviews.review_title: This game is BUNS! Do buy. FOR DEVELOPER
reviews.review_description: Yes you heard me right so I'ma get straight to the point. So here is why you SHOULD get it... If you either #1 new to fps VR or #2 if your just new to VR completely. Now here is why I this is my opinion why I don't necessarily like it #1 I love the storyline but it gets very repetitive after the trench part #2 there is a bug where I get stuck in the ground and have to restart my game #3 the ai allies are trash at aiming pls make them better#4 pls nerf the ai enemy they are literally Minecraft skeletons iykyk.
Beautiful story, so many amazing plot points, memorable characters, and very historically accurate WW2 recreation, I’m sobbing, so emotional.
